Best soft sector-data combo: keep hard sector filter and softly rerank by sector rotation plus stock-vs-sector leadership.

dynamic_sector_admission.role: retain static mid-band sector prior and add looser breakout dynamic admission overlay
dynamic_sector_admission.tradeoff_note: Adopted as a parity-safe dynamic exception layer: static historical sector prior is retained, while non-listed sectors can enter the mid band when same-day sector breakout and stock-vs-sector leadership are both strong.
